candidates_clusters_v4.tsv.cluster_strategy: singleton — new IDs assigned unique cl{30..95}_<next_avail> per threshold

glycan_binders_v4.tsv.tool_flag_strategy: all 8 tool flags = 1, total_sources = 8 — TropiSEQ training proteins are RBPs by definition

next_step: Use these companion files alongside agent 4's highconf_v4/pipeline_positive_v4.list and host_phage_protein_map_v4.tsv. Embed candidates_v4_additions.faa with ProtT5 mean and ProtT5 xl seg8, then merge into the training NPZs at training time (or pre-merge once).
